'''鈭歡-m-n''' ('''gamana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calloc|calloc]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calloc|calloc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| gamana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamanithi|gamanithi]] || [[word:gamaniji|gamaniji]] || [[word:gamanishi|gamanishi]] || [[word:gamani|gamani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamanuthuth|gamanuthuth]] || [[word:gamanujuj|gamanujuj]] || [[word:gamanushush|gamanushush]] || [[word:gaman|gaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamanuthu|gamanuthu]] || [[word:gamanuju|gamanuju]] || [[word:gamanushu|gamanushu]] || [[word:gamanu|gamanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamanufuth|gamanufuth]] || [[word:gamanufuj|gamanufuj]] || [[word:gamanufush|gamanufush]] || [[word:gamanuf|gamanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamanethe|gamanethe]] || [[word:gamaneje|gamaneje]] || [[word:gamaneshe|gamaneshe]] || [[word:gamane|gamane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamanothoth|gamanothoth]] || [[word:gamanojoj|gamanojoj]] || [[word:gamanoshosh|gamanoshosh]] || [[word:gaman|gaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamanotho|gamanotho]] || [[word:gamanojo|gamanojo]] || [[word:gamanosho|gamanosho]] || [[word:gamano|gamano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamanofoth|gamanofoth]] || [[word:gamanofoj|gamanofoj]] || [[word:gamanofosh|gamanofosh]] || [[word:gamanof|gamanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gaman忙th忙|gaman忙th忙]] || [[word:gaman忙j忙|gaman忙j忙]] || [[word:gaman忙sh忙|gaman忙sh忙]] || [[word:gaman忙|gaman忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamanathath|gamanathath]] || [[word:gamanajaj|gamanajaj]] || [[word:gamanashash|gamanashash]] || [[word:gaman|gaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamanatha|gamanatha]] || [[word:gamanaja|gamanaja]] || [[word:gamanasha|gamanasha]] || [[word:gamana|gamana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamanafath|gamanafath]] || [[word:gamanafaj|gamanafaj]] || [[word:gamanafash|gamanafash]] || [[word:gamanaf|gamanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gamanasha|gamanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogamanasha|gogamanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigamanasha|gokigamanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gaman眉sha|gaman眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogamankn眉sha|gogamankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigaman眉sha|gokigaman眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gamansh毛sha|gamansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogamanksh毛sha|gogamanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigamansh毛sha|gokigamansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamanrosha|gamanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamankrosha|gogamankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamanrosha|gokigamanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gamanmusha|gamanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamankmusha|gogamankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamanmusha|gokigamanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gamansherasha|gamansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogamanksherasha|gogamanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigamansherasha|gokigamansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gamangasha|gamangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogamankngasha|gogamankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigamangasha|gokigamangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gamanyasha|gamanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogamankyasha|gogamankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigamanyasha|gokigamanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gamanyamasha|gamanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogamankyamasha|gogamankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigamanyamasha|gokigamanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gaman眉sh毛sha|gaman眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamankn眉sh毛sha|gogamankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigaman眉sh毛sha|gokigaman眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gaman眉rosha|gaman眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamankn眉rosha|gogamankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigaman眉rosha|gokigaman眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gaman眉musha|gaman眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamankn眉musha|gogamankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigaman眉musha|gokigaman眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamansh毛n眉sha|gamansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamanksh毛n眉sha|gogamanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamansh毛n眉sha|gokigamansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamansh毛rosha|gamansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamanksh毛rosha|gogamanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamansh毛rosha|gokigamansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamansh毛musha|gamansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamanksh毛musha|gogamanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamansh毛musha|gokigamansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamanron眉sha|gamanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamankron眉sha|gogamankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamanron眉sha|gokigamanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamanrosh毛sha|gamanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamankrosh毛sha|gogamankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamanrosh毛sha|gokigamanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamanromusha|gamanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamankromusha|gogamankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamanromusha|gokigamanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamanmun眉sha|gamanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamankmun眉sha|gogamankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamanmun眉sha|gokigamanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamanmush毛sha|gamanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamankmush毛sha|gogamankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamanmush毛sha|gokigamanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamanmurosha|gamanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamankmurosha|gogamankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamanmurosha|gokigamanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gaman|gaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:g忙m忙n|g忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogaman|hogaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hog忙m忙n|hog忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogaman|hohogaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohog忙m忙n|hohog忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉gaman|n眉gaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉g忙m忙n|n眉g忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉gaman|n眉n眉gaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉g忙m忙n|n眉n眉g忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂gaman|n茂gaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂g忙m忙n|n茂g忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂gaman|n茂n茂gaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂g忙m忙n|n茂n茂g忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugaman|lugaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lug忙m忙n|lug忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugaman|lulugaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulug忙m忙n|lulug忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligaman|ligaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lig忙m忙n|lig忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligaman|liligaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilig忙m忙n|lilig忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogaman|kogaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kog忙m忙n|kog忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogaman|kokogaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokog忙m忙n|kokog忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegaman|kegaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keg忙m忙n|keg忙m忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegaman|kekegaman]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeg忙m忙n|kekeg忙m忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
